title: Project Rek
description: This modpack was made for the enjoyment of me and my group but I've decided to make it public! This modpack will prove to be extremely difficult considering the shared life and very intelligent zombies!
body:
This modpack is likely one of the most difficult multiplayer survival modpacks out there! It features shared health aswell as progressive difficulty as the days go on.

# **Zombies**

The zombies in this modpack are not fun whatesoever, they can mine, build, jump towards you, see you from further away, most of them can sprint, and they don't burn in the daytime! These zombies can spawn in hordes and may also have items to grant them abilities such as tnt, fishing rods, enderpearls, and more! If any player dies to a zombie in this modpack, they and everyone else's player will be turned into a zombie containing all their items. Player zombies will not despawn so be careful! There is still one brightside to all this, there's no baby zombies!

# **Generation**

As far as world generation goes, I've implemented Biomes O' Plenty, Biome Makeover, Towns, and Towers, aswell as alot more to make the wolrd less vanilla!
!

# **Performance**

Performance enhancing mods are included so everyone can generate worlds faster, run the game smoother, and simply overall reduce the risk of crashing!
